Common.appDescription: A comprehensive CRM solution for managing organizations and team members

Sidebar.liveDescription: Track leads, tours, and pipeline movement from one place.

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.pageDescription: Manage your workspace access and team configuration from one place.

Team.title: Team Members
Team.subtitle: Manage organization members and their roles
Team.noMembersHint: Team members will appear here once added to the organization

Roles.title: Roles & Permissions
Roles.subtitle: Manage organization roles and their permissions
Roles.roleNameMinLength: Name must be at least 3 characters
Roles.noRolesHint: Create your first role to get started
Roles.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the role "{name}"?
Roles.unexpectedErrorCreating: An unexpected error occurred while creating the role
Roles.unexpectedErrorUpdating: An unexpected error occurred while updating the role

MemberPermissions.title: Extra Permissions for {name}
MemberPermissions.unexpectedErrorUpdating: An unexpected error occurred while updating permissions

AccessRequests.title: Access Requests
AccessRequests.subtitle: Review pending approvals
AccessRequests.noRequestsDescription: New access requests will appear here when teammates ask to join this workspace.
AccessRequests.assignRoleDescription: Select a role for this user before approving their access request.

Alerts.changeRoleDescription: Are you sure you want to change this member's role? This will immediately alter their access permissions.

Home.heroDescription: Organize leads, manage sales teams, and track tours in one secure, high-performance workspace. Request private beta access.
Home.featureUnifiedDesc: Consolidate your entire travel ecosystem into a single, lightning-fast dashboard designed for high-volume agencies.
Home.featurePrecisionDesc: Real-time tracking of agent performance and tour profitability with granular reporting modules.
Home.featureEnterpriseDesc: End-to-end encryption for client data and secure multi-role access controls for growing sales teams.
Home.limitedBetaDescription: We are currently onboarding a select group of agencies to our private testing phase. Secure your spot in the future of tour management.

Auth.loginDescription: Sign in to continue to onboarding.
Auth.registerDescription: Register, sign in automatically, and continue to onboarding.
Auth.passwordMinError: Password must be at least 8 characters
Auth.somethingWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.

Dashboard.performanceOverview: Here is your agency's performance overview for today.
Dashboard.bookingAnalyticsText: Performance analytics for the last 30 days
Dashboard.recentInquiriesText: High intent requests from the last 24 hours
Dashboard.aiPrediction: AI predicts a 15% surge in US-based inquiries for Boutique Istanbul tours next week.

MemberProfile.title: Member Profile
MemberProfile.developmentDescription: Detailed user activity and performance metrics are currently in development.

Greeting.question: How would you like to get started?

ChoiceCards.joinDescription: I have an invite code or workspace URL
ChoiceCards.createDescription: I am setting up TourCRM for my company

Create.subtitle: Company Profile
Create.title: Let's set up your workspace
Create.description: Give your company a name and we'll suggest a clean workspace URL you can use right away.
Create.companyNameError: Company Name must be at least 2 characters
Create.slugHint: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only. This URL can be shared with teammates.
Create.slugError: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only
Create.slugMinError: Workspace URL must be at least 3 characters

Invite.subtitle: Invite Team
Invite.title: Bring your crew on board
Invite.description: Invite agents and managers now, or continue to preferences and do it later.
Invite.emptyState: No invitations yet. Use the form above to start building your team.
Invite.errorFallback: Something went wrong. Please try again.

Join.title: Let's join your workspace
Join.description: Enter the workspace URL or slug you were invited to.
Join.slugHint: This will be the permanent URL for your workspace.
Join.slugError: Workspace URL must be at least 3 characters

Preferences.subtitle: Final Step
Preferences.title: Preferences will live here later.
Preferences.description: This is a simple placeholder so the onboarding flow stays complete while we build out the final preferences experience.

Waiting.title: Your request has been sent.
Waiting.description: We are waiting for a workspace admin to approve your access. You will be redirected automatically when approved.
Waiting.cancelError: Could not find a pending request to cancel.
